<a id="class-textserveradvanced"></a>

# TextServerAdvanced

**Inherits:** [TextServerExtension](class_textserverextension.md#class-textserverextension) **<** [TextServer](class_textserver.md#class-textserver) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

An advanced text server with support for BiDi, complex text layout, and contextual OpenType features. Used in Godot by default.

## Description

An implementation of [TextServer](class_textserver.md#class-textserver) that uses HarfBuzz, ICU and SIL Graphite to support BiDi, complex text layouts and contextual OpenType features. This is Godot's default primary [TextServer](class_textserver.md#class-textserver) interface.
